reasoning: The control focuses on minimizing key storage locations and ensuring secure key management. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that secrets are stored securely and in as few locations as necessary. This involves using Kubernetes Secrets with encryption at rest enabled (etcd encryption) and integrating with external secret managers to centralize and secure key management. These practices align with the control's intent to minimize key exposure and enhance security.
title: Examine key storage locations and observe processes to verify that keys are stored in the fewest ...
